name: uncovered-highlight
description: A package and tool to display source code with uncovered parts highlighted

scripts.testprogs:run: npm run testprogs:build && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=testprogs/coverage node testprogs/dist/test1.js && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=testprogs/coverage node testprogs/dist/test2.js && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=testprogs/coverage node testprogs/dist/test3.js
